name: Altech Advanced Materials AG
summary: Altech Advanced Materials AG manufactures and sells linerboards for use in consumer packaging industry in the People's Republic of China. It offers single-sided testliners, double-sided testliners, and anti counterfeit linerboards. The company's linerboards are used for the production of corrugated board and boxes, paper bags, and apparel labels and tags. It provides its products to cardboard manufacturers, and printing and packaging companies that produce consumer goods, such as shoes, apparel, electronic products, and toys under the Guige brand name primarily in Fujian and Guangdong provinces. The company was formerly known as Youbisheng Green Paper AG. Altech Advanced Materials AG was founded in 2000 and is based in Heidelberg, Germany.
